questions.question: Tom can paint $2$ rooms in $5$ hours. How many rooms can he paint in $15$ hours?
A bakery sells $250$ loaves of bread per day. If they make a profit of $$1.50$ per loaf, what is their total daily profit?
A car travels $180$ miles in $3$ hours. What is its average speed in miles per hour?
The cost of $x$ kilograms of apples is directly proportional to $x$. If $5$ kilograms cost $$25$, what is the cost of $8$ kilograms?
A water tank can hold $1200$ gallons of water. If $3$ gallons of water are added to the tank every minute, how many minutes will it take to fill the tank?
The distance $d$ that a car travels is directly proportional to the time $t$ that it travels. If the car travels $250$ miles in $5$ hours, what is the distance it travels in $8$ hours?
A group of friends want to share some candy equally. If they have $48$ pieces of candy and there are $8$ friends, how many pieces will each friend get?
The price $p$ of a product is inversely proportional to the number of items $n$ purchased. If $5$ items cost $$30$, what is the cost of $10$ items?
A bike ride takes $2$ hours to travel $20$ miles. If the rider increases the speed by $25\%$, how many miles can the rider travel in $3$ hours?
The cost of renting a boat is $$20$ per hour plus an additional $$10$ per hour for gas. If $4$ people rent the boat for $6$ hours, what is the total cost per person?

teacher_rules: Always read the questions carefully before answering
Use scrap paper to work out problems
Check your work before submitting your answers
